description: Tinted lens with 100% UV protection and 100% distortion free Has leans coating to reduce glare and improve contrast Stylised plastic frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durability Flexible hinges for durability Fixed nose holder with a thick nose bridge which is part of the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
